modules.name: match_pipe.units
modules.role: Requirement-unit extraction, logic typing, weight assignment.

modules.name: match_pipe.matcher
modules.role: Recall, scoring, ranking, feature gating for teacher variants.

modules.name: match_pipe.benchmark
modules.role: Legacy benchmark, rebuilt hard pool, evaluation metrics.

modules.name: runtime.automation.jd_builder.row_to_jd_markdown
modules.role: Reconstruct raw JD markdown from existing sheet fields.

modules.name: runtime.automation.text_utils.normalize_token
modules.role: String normalization only; no old routing or seed logic.

data_structures.name: data/deliverables/resume_portfolio/by_company/*/*/*/job.md
data_structures.role: Historical raw JD text when available.

data_structures.name: portfolio_index.json
data_structures.role: Used only for benchmark context in previous experiments; not required by the current matcher runtime.

indices.name: combo_index
indices.source: recall keys derived from high-weight requirement units

feature_sources.name: company_name, job_title, job_seniority, work_model, job_summary, must_have_quals, preferred_quals
no seed registry / no seed index / no route_mode / no old cluster key at runtime

features: normalized-title exact match inside duplicate score

quantitative_impact.gating: Can bypass hard-requirement penalty when duplicate_score >= 0.85.

features: same_company term inside duplicate_score for Teacher-A
work-model / education / location canonicalized from metadata text

recommended_architecture.pure_semantic_channel: Teacher-B style channel should own canonical taxonomy, requirement units, logic, hierarchy and must/preferred ranking.
recommended_architecture.duplicate_channel: Teacher-C style duplicate/near-duplicate channel should be explicit and separately audited.
recommended_architecture.same_company_channel: Move same-company consistency to a separate downstream constraint/reranker instead of embedding it into the semantic teacher.
